name: Terriermon

signature_move.name: Petit Twister
signature_move.description: Generates a tiny tornado by spinning its ears like a propeller.

description: With one horn growing from its head, it is a Digimon shrouded in mystery. It can be classified as a Beast Digimon from its body structure, but it's still not understood what kind of evolved form it will take on. Also, it is rumored that it is sometimes born with a twin. It's a very cute type of Digimon, and from its calm behavior it's hard to believe that it is a " Combat Species " Digimon, but when it comes to battle, it shows that it is more powerful than it appears. Its Signature Move is generating a tiny tornado by spinning its ears like a propeller ( Petit Twister ). Its Special Move is spewing out a shot of superheated air ( Blazing Fire ). Also, it possesses a great power in the Unison Technique Double Typhoon that it performs with Lopmon , its twin.
